auditor.summary: The generated code implements the core technical requirements: React.memo with custom areEqual comparators for all 5 components, CSS Modules for all 6 components, dynamic imports with loading skeletons, and a prefetch hook with 100ms debounce. However, the output was truncated, missing critical test files (memoization.test.tsx, prefetch.test.tsx, cssModules.test.tsx), next.config.js modifications, and package.json updates. The most critical issue is the absence of webpackChunkName magic comments on dynamic imports, which violates a core constraint. The memoization implementation has practical issues: Panel and Badge comparators effectively disable memoization for common use cases with children. The code is structurally sound but incomplete for full acceptance criteria satisfaction. Score is 72 due to missing test files and configuration, with critical issues that must be addressed before shipping.

top_issues.description: Missing webpackChunkName magic comments on all dynamic imports. Build spec explicitly requires 'All dynamic import chunks must include webpackChunkName magic comments for bundle analyzer legibility'.
Test file was not generated (truncated). Acceptance criteria #4 requires this test to pass.
